title: phebalium glandulosum subsp. riparium
intro: Phebalium glandulosum subsp. riparium, also known as the Coastal Phebalium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is a shrub native to eastern Australia and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Coastal Phebalium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions and infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
